title: Binding
description: Defines the protocol, IP address, port, and optional hostname that a web site listens on. The binding_information property format is '{ip_address}:{port}:{hostname}' for HTTP and HTTPS protocols.

protocol.description: The protocol for this binding (e.g., http, https, net.tcp).

binding_information.description: Combined binding string in the format '{ip_address}:{port}:{hostname}'.

ip_address.description: The IP address to bind to. Use '*' for all addresses.

port.description: The port number to listen on.

hostname.description: The hostname for host header-based routing.

require_sni.description: Whether Server Name Indication (SNI) is required for this binding.
